claim_text_short: Strict-source S1 has high regret on the frozen field.
required_qualifiers: Field-specific comparison against registered controls and Q0 only.
forbidden_expansion: Universal source-only failure; intrinsic weakness of balanced accuracy.

claim_text_short: COTT materially improves S1 on seed 3 under the registered Q1 gate.
required_qualifiers: Exact C82 max-T gate; COTT/U13; one training seed.
forbidden_expansion: Cross-seed success; deployability; COTT superiority in general.

claim_text_short: COTT retains positive Q1 direction on seed 4 but the exact Q1 gate is inactive.
required_qualifiers: Positive material mean, 7/8 favorable targets, max-T p=0.101167; no sign reversal claim.
forbidden_expansion: Seed4 Q1 pass; negative directional effect; general COTT failure.

claim_text_short: No primary zero-label method passes Q0 B=1 noninferiority on either seed.
required_qualifiers: Applies to six locked primary zero-label representatives and margin 0.05.
forbidden_expansion: Universal zero-label impossibility; universal one-label sufficiency.

claim_text_short: No fixed zero-label method supports a common cross-seed A or B result.
required_qualifiers: Seed categories are B/C; both A and B intersections are empty.

claim_text_short: Measurement association, regret, top-k localization, and target robustness yield distinct conclusions.
required_qualifiers: No endpoint substitutes for another; target is the principal cluster.
forbidden_expansion: Mechanism; causality; high association implies actionability.

claim_text_short: Construction-label information yields a lower-regret frontier on this frozen field.
required_qualifiers: Exact Q0 passive policy, frozen split, source-relative materiality.
forbidden_expansion: Universal minimal budget; deployment-free labels; active-policy optimality.

claim_text_short: C80 B*=1 is a full-panel source-relative result with a 2-4 LOTO envelope.
required_qualifiers: All 16 LOTO panels move B* to 2 or 4; FULL remains cell-specific.

claim_text_short: C81 is blocked and C82 is a post-C81-outcome-access recovery.
required_qualifiers: C82 does not retroactively change C81-E.
forbidden_expansion: C81 scientific result; untouched C82 confirmation.

claim_text_short: All C80/C82 conclusions are dataset-, field-, split-, and policy-specific.
required_qualifiers: Same targets/trials and two paired training seeds; no external dataset.
forbidden_expansion: External validity; new-subject generalization; deployment claim.
